.config [dir]
.config/a [dir]
.config/a/b [dir]
.config/a/b/c [dir]
.config/a/b/c/d [dir]
.config/a/b/c/d/file -> <REPO>/demo/src/file
.config/easyrice [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs/easyrice.log [file]
.config/easyrice/repos [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/src [dir]
